stance_events.normalized_proposition: Donald Trump opposes allowing asylum seekers to enter the United States at the southern border.
stance_events.speaker: Donald Trump
stance_events.quote_text: We will shut down the border on day one. No more open borders.
stance_events.paraphrase: Trump pledged to close the southern border immediately upon taking office.

stance_events.normalized_proposition: Donald Trump supports imposing 60 percent tariffs on goods imported from China.
stance_events.speaker: Donald Trump
stance_events.paraphrase: Trump indicated he would levy 60% tariffs on Chinese imports if elected.
stance_events.notes: No direct quotation available; based on reported remarks at campaign rally.
